query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "arcane: do role-playing language agents stay in character at the right" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same core mechanism (character consistency and staying in character) and dependent variable (hallucination/irrelevance in role-playing) that the user's question targets, even though it proposes a retrieval-based solution rather than a purely linguistic analysis. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and domain-specific evidence on the "role-playing" construct required for a literature review on this topic.
